mapper.sql: id, post_id, language_code, title, summary, content, content_format, ai_tags, source_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM post_i18n WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY language_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_i18n ( post_id, language_code, title, summary, content, content_format, ai_tags, source_type ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{languageCode}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{contentFormat}, #{aiTags}, #{sourceType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE post_i18n SET language_code = #{languageCode}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, content_format = #{contentFormat}, ai_tags = #{aiTags}, source_type = #{sourceType} WHERE id = #{id}
